creator: osidorkin@gmail.com
text:
Sorry, but without the correct plugin I can not do the committ, we expect
> the maintainer to fix with the correct plugin, otherwise I will close
> without committing.
>

KMymoney SQLite plugin works via qt sqlite plugin that is distributed with
KMyMoney. Is this right to install qt plugins with kmymoney? I don't know
what the exact policies are.

Thanks for your attention.

-- 
Oleg Sidorkin
